heading: API Documentation
body:
To learn more about any of the methods or types discussed in this
guide, see the following API documentation:

- [Collection.bulkWrite()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#bulkWrite)

- [MongoClient.bulkWrite()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/MongoClient.html#bulkWrite)

- [BulkWriteResult](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/BulkWriteResult.html)

- [ClientBulkWriteResult](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/ClientBulkWriteResult.html)

- [ClientBulkWriteModel](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/types/ClientBulkWriteModel.html)

- [InsertOneModel](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/OrderedBulkOperation.html#insert)

- [InsertOne](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#insertOne)

- [ReplaceOne](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#replaceOne)

- [ReplaceOneModel](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/ReplaceOneModel.html)

- [UpdateOne](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#updateOne)

- [UpdateMany](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#updateMany)

- [UpdateOneModel](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/UpdateOneModel.html)

- [DeleteOne](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#deleteOne)
